Title: xOrder - Get Orders Query
Preconditions: User authenticated; orders exist for user; auth header set in GraphiQL
Steps:
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type query: query { orders(filter: "" sort: "createdDate:desc") { totalCount items { id number status createdDate total { amount } } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — verify orders list
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[DATA] totalCount > 0
[DATA] items[] sorted by createdDate descending
[DATA] Each item has id, number, status, createdDate, total.amount
[DATA] status is a known enum value (New, Processing, Completed, etc.)
[DATA] Pagination: first/after params work to return subsets
[ERRORS] No errors[] in response
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Re-execute same query → same results
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel; totalCount = 0 when orders exist; sort order wrong; missing total.amount; GraphiQL shows auth error without token

Title: xOrder - Get Order Detail Query
Preconditions: Order exists; order ID/number known from GQL-011; auth header set in GraphiQL
Steps:
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type query: order query by ID or number with full detail fields
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — verify full order detail
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[DATA] Full order object returned with correct id/number
[DATA] items[] (line items) non-empty with productId, quantity, price
[DATA] addresses[] non-empty; at least one address with city, countryCode populated
[DATA] inPayments[] non-empty; payment has paymentMethod and status
[MATH] Order totals (subTotal + shipping + tax = grandTotal within tolerance)
[ERRORS] No errors[] in response
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Re-execute query → same order detail
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel; items[] empty; addresses[] empty; inPayments[] empty; GraphiQL shows auth error

Title: xOrder - CustomerOrderType Full-Field Schema Coverage
Preconditions: User authenticated; at least one completed order exists with items, shipment, payment, and addresses; GraphiQL UI accessible at {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token grant_type=password&scope=offline_access&username=@td(USER_DEFAULT.email)&password=@td(USER_DEFAULT.password)&storeId=@td(STORE_PRIMARY.id) → save bearer token
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql
[WAIT] GraphiQL editor loaded
[ACT] Click "Headers" button (right tab) → set auth token via execCommand('insertText') on Headers textarea → screenshot to verify
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[SETUP] Get most recent order number: query { orders(first: 1 sort: "createdDate:desc") { items { number } } } → save items[0].number as <ORDER_NUMBER>
[ACT] Clear editor → type full-field order query: query { order(number: "<ORDER_NUMBER>") { id operationType parentOperationId number isApproved status statusDisplayValue comment outerId isCancelled cancelledDate cancelReason objectType customerId customerName channelId storeId storeName organizationId organizationName employeeId employeeName shoppingCartId isPrototype subscriptionNumber subscriptionId purchaseOrderNumber taxType taxPercentRate languageCode createdDate createdBy modifiedDate modifiedBy currency { code name symbol exchangeRate } total { amount formattedAmount currency { code } } taxTotal { amount } discountAmount { amount } subTotal { amount } subTotalWithTax { amount } subTotalDiscount { amount } subTotalDiscountWithTax { amount } subTotalTaxTotal { amount } shippingTotal { amount } shippingTotalWithTax { amount } shippingSubTotal { amount } shippingSubTotalWithTax { amount } shippingDiscountTotal { amount } shippingDiscountTotalWithTax { amount } shippingTaxTotal { amount } paymentTotal { amount } paymentTotalWithTax { amount } paymentSubTotal { amount } paymentSubTotalWithTax { amount } paymentDiscountTotal { amount } paymentDiscountTotalWithTax { amount } paymentTaxTotal { amount } discountTotal { amount } discountTotalWithTax { amount } fee { amount } feeWithTax { amount } feeTotal { amount } feeTotalWithTax { amount } addresses { id city countryCode countryName firstName lastName line1 line2 postalCode regionId regionName phone email addressType } items { id productId sku name quantity price { amount } extendedPrice { amount } discountAmount { amount } taxTotal { amount } taxPercentRate placedPrice { amount } } inPayments { id number status gatewayCode paymentMethod { code typeName paymentMethodType paymentMethodGroupType } sum { amount } taxTotal { amount } billingAddress { city line1 countryCode postalCode } } shipments { id number status shipmentMethodCode shipmentMethodOption deliveryAddress { city line1 countryCode postalCode } price { amount } taxTotal { amount } items { lineItemId quantity } } taxDetails { name rate amount { amount } } dynamicProperties { name value valueType } coupons { code } discounts { promotionId description amount { amount } coupon } availablePaymentMethods { code paymentMethodType paymentMethodGroupType } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read full response — systematically inspect every field group
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[ERRORS] No errors[] in response — all CustomerOrderType fields must resolve
[DATA] id, number — non-null strings; number matches requested order
[DATA] status, statusDisplayValue — non-null strings
[DATA] customerId, customerName — non-null for authenticated user's order
[DATA] storeId, storeName — non-null strings
[DATA] createdDate, modifiedDate — non-null ISO date strings
[DATA] currency — object with code ("USD"), name, symbol (all non-null)
[DATA] total.amount — number > 0; total.formattedAmount — non-empty string
[DATA] subTotal.amount — number > 0
[DATA] All MoneyType fields: { amount, currency { code } } structure — no { amount, currencyCode }
[DATA] addresses[] — non-empty array; each has city, countryCode, line1 (non-null for shipping/billing)
[DATA] items[] — non-empty array; each has id, productId, sku, name, quantity (all non-null)
[DATA] items[].price.amount — number > 0 per line item
[DATA] inPayments[] — non-empty array; each has id, gatewayCode, paymentMethod object, sum.amount
[DATA] shipments[] — non-empty array; each has id, shipmentMethodCode, deliveryAddress, price.amount
[DATA] shipments[].items[] — non-empty; each has lineItemId
[DATA] taxDetails[] — array (may be empty; each has name, rate, amount)
[DATA] dynamicProperties[] — array (may be empty)
[DATA] discountTotal.amount — number ≥ 0
[DATA] operationType — string (typically "CustomerOrder")
[DATA] isApproved, isCancelled, isPrototype — booleans (not null)
[DATA] No field returns an error object or unexpected null where schema indicates non-nullable
[MATH] subTotal.amount + shippingTotal.amount + taxTotal.amount - discountTotal.amount ≈ total.amount (within rounding tolerance)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Re-execute identical query → identical response structure
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: Any CustomerOrderType field returns null unexpectedly; addresses[] empty for order with shipping; items[] empty; inPayments[] empty; shipments[] empty; MoneyType structure broken; total.amount is 0; status is null; errors[] non-empty
